member_group_no.nulltext: ดูทั้งหมด ไม่ต้องเลือกนะจ๊ะ

member_group_type.nulltext: ดูทั้งหมด ไม่ต้องเลือกนะจ๊ะ

root.sql:
SELECT sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control
,sum( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.share_balance ) as share_balance ,count( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_contract ) as emer_count ,sum( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_balance ) as emer_balance ,count( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_contract ) as norm_count ,sum( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_balance ) as norm_balance ,count( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_contract ) as spec_contract ,sum( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_balance ) as spec_balance ,count(distinct sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.membership_no ) as count_mem FROM sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control WHERE ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control.control_id = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id ) and ( ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.client_id = '000' ) ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.share_balance > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_balance > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_balance > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_balance > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_intarr > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_intarr > 0 or sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_intarr > 0 ) /*WHERE*/ --and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.balance_date = '31/07/2020' /*รายงานตัวนี้ มีใช้ formatting rules ในรายงานเด้อ*/ group by sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_group_no

r_krabi_sum_sh_loan_balance_nest_norm.sql: SELECT sum(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_balance) as c_norm, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description FROM sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_lon_m_rule WHERE ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_loantype = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) --and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control = {0} ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.client_id = '000' ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.norm_balance > 0 ) /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description

r_krabi_sum_sh_loan_balance_nest_emer.sql: SELECT sum(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_balance) as c_emer, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description FROM sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_lon_m_rule WHERE ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_loantype = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) --and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control = {0} ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.emer_balance > 0 ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.client_id = '000' ) /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description

r_krabi_sum_sh_loan_balance_nest_spec.sql: SELECT sum(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_balance) as c_spec, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description FROM sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_lon_m_rule WHERE ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_loantype = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) --and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control = {0} ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_year.spec_balance > 0 ) /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description
